channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Should I Sell This Random SCHD Position — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should I Sell This Random SCHD Position

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-06-30 18:08 UTC

OP

I was just putting a small percentage of my money in here when I started investing (didn’t realize dividends don’t matter when you’re young) and haven’t put money into it since last December, so that return is basically a bit fudged since the price just rose once and stagnated since without any more contributions besides DRIP
I kinda wanna sell it and allocate it somewhere else or would the tax paid on that make it negligible and I should just wait and see what DRIP does in a few decades
If I sell I would either just put it in some market ETF or maybe something more volatile, unsure

Early replies (first 3)

62430108
Looks like lil bro got corralled into the dividend trap.

It depends on your human value, really. If you have a positive outlook where you can leverage skills to work and climb the paycheck ladder, you might want to stay in and add more, especially if you are risk averse.

So on the other hand, there is a good argument to be made for taking on more risk. Right now you are investing in grandpa's fund. Grandpa cant survive a 5 year bear market because ... well he'll literally die in the meantime. You can survive a 10 year bear market and come out rich on the other end.

Now, do NOT listen to /biz/. They will get you in all sorts of shit, like SCHD, moonshot gambles, financial cults, crypto scams. Here you will absolutely get the worst advice in the world.
So i recommend you to talk about it with AI. Not chatgpt. Established approaches to portfolio management exist for a reason. It's backed by math and shit. You dont need stock picks from wizards. I could tell you what to buy, but AI can also do that adequately.

If I were young I would maxblast it in sectors that are projected to grow a lot over the next decade+ like robotics and biotech.
S&P can get fucked because 5k is nothing. Unless you may need the 5k... etc etc thi is why an AI 'conversation' will help you better. Good luck

62430156
>>62430031
no offense but 5k is such a tiny quantity of money it truly doesn't matter what you do with it.

62430200
No bullshit yesterday I sold 300 shares of schd. I just bought more vxus with it because it has similar dividend returns plus it adds diversification for my portfolio

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62430259
>>62430031
Up 20% in less than a year is an excellent return.
Obviously you want to gamble with the reddit morons and biztards.
SCHD is my largest holding in my self directed IRA.
But I'm in my mid-40s so I can't afford another total ass rape like happened in 2009 and 2020 to me already.
SCHD is a solid low stress long term hold.
OTOH you can Yolo into AIQ or stock pick like a degen gambler and see where that takes you.

62430261
>>62430031
>only 20% plus dividends in 9 months?
>biz how do I buy 3x triple inverse puts on Tesla?!

62430285
>>62430261
Who suggested anything like this
>>62430156
It is if it compounds over the next decade or so, cumulatively with other money
>>62430108
Okay if you’re not bullshitting me which AI - I’ve talked with ChatGPT before but ask it very explicitly to never agree with my claims without reason and properly source every single claim it is making.

62430405
>>62430108
>So i recommend you to talk about it with AI. Not AI.
wut?

62430474
>>62430031
>I should just wait and see what DRIP does in a few decades
This. Definitely don't sell it and re-allocate. Futzing around with your investments like this is a good way to kill your returns. Studies by Vanguard and Fidelity consistently show that their best performing accounts are the ones with the least activity (e.g. 401k's that people just contribute to and don't keep changing their allocations, and old 401k's that people just left sitting there after they changed jobs). You can keep kicking a bit into SCHD every year if you feel like it. But at your age most of your investments should go into growth funds. One good mix is SCHD and SCHG (Schwab's growth fund). There's almost no overlap between their holdings (yay diversity), and because of that each one tends to do better in different market climates.

62430528
>>62430108
>So i recommend you to talk about it with AI. Not chatgpt.
You're not the sharpest tool in the shed. You talk about ChatGPT like we are literally in 2023.

62430556
>>62430528
Look dumbass, a kid with $5k isnt paying for an LLM and free chatgpt is the worst tool in the world for any kind of research. ESPECIALLY financial.
>>62430285
Gemini is the bwst free option.

Inb4 the horde of /biz/ retards (who are full port in WEN, GME and chainlink, mind you) dismisses Gemini because it doesnt say that the jews or niggers are responsible for their shit lives

t. professional ai usooor and llm research00r

62430686
>>62430556
Tbf I got like $55,000 just chilling in VOO I’ve just been acting retarded lately and have wanted to chase returns with shit like DRAM and was gonna sell SCHD for that but won’t now
Will probably just go back to DCA VOO or find some other ETF to satellite with idk maybe SOXX

62430736
>>62430556
>Look dumbass, a kid with $5k isnt paying for an LLM and free chatgpt is the worst tool in the world for any kind of research. ESPECIALLY financial.
You are such an actual fucktard. Tell me, in your pea brain, how does finance research look like? Asking the AI to give stock tips?
Here is an example how triple-digit IQs use ChatGPT.
https://chatgpt.com/share/6a43dd41-ec40-83eb-ac62-7ce8829bfd7c
The funny thing is, I know that how I use it (e.g. asking it to dissuade me from something) is literally a revelation to you. Not in a thousand years would you arrive at the idea that this tool can be used in such ways.

62430955
>>62430736
Kek based moron
>>62430686
Oh, I thought you'd be all in like many schwabheads. well, that makes 5k in it an even bigger waste IMO. It also doesnt do anything to your portfolio in terms of safety because 5k is a pittance compared to your VOO.

Find 1 or 2 companies you can love and be highly confident in. Make sure it's in a sector you know something about. If you don't know anything about any sector, research some. Tell AI to analyze and rank any of your picks based on widely used basic corporate frameworks wrt internal and external analysis. Faith and knowledge are important for stock picking because it helps you stomach drawdowns. Losing 1k feels much worse than gaining 1k.

Sector ETFs have been pretty good too and worth considering over picks. But many of them are fuckin memes. Dont even bother with those fake ass gay ass ETFs with like 20 stocks in it IMO. In that case you may be better off spreading risk across the top 3 or top 5. Thats my own bias though. Data might show the opposite is true

Other than that youre already actually beating biz with 50k in VOO. Realistically, you can do nothing and win.

62430982
Btw fuck stoxx. Don t buy anything niggers here buy.

Ive posted about my best performing stocks and ideas and they got 0 (you)s ever because many drooling retards here are nothing but gamblers who think they can predict the next 10 minutes of price action

Biz talks about stoxx every day thats how I know not to buy it at whatever valuation its currently at. and will probably never buy it until I see pink wojaks

62430987
Meant soxx obviously kek

62431001
I fell for the divie meme too but its not so bad if you also have growth, 50/50 schd qqq outperforms the spy on every metric

Id say just keep it and dca into other stuff. If you sell it the market will crash to punish you

62431012
In case you wonder why gemini. It is good because it has the best access to Google, amd Google is the internet. For research, you need the internet. Plus it doesn't waste your time with emojis and sassy fag shit like GPT and Claude do. I'll happily consneed that other models may be better for coding or for jerking off to waifus. All benchmarks are lies

62431063
>>62430955
Interesting well like I said I was gonna go after RAM producing companies for now
Nothing else really strikes me as a buy

62431355
>>62431063
In my opinion, ot looks like RAM etc has good earnings until next year. It's likely to continue to go up but until when? My horizin is a little longer.

But in such insane headwinds yiu have to stay wary of major disruptions.

E.g. The oil price is important. Many things depend on the oil price. This motivates big players to seek lower prices by any means necessary. Even murder and war. This is like the brgaining power of buyers.

Same with ram. I'm sure it can easily cook for aother year but at some points somebody's gonna fuck it all up. Usually its the government kek. (Or Fed) besides political forces, nothing is really stopping google or amazon from making chips. Its not arcane occult knowledge. It's a make or buy decision and there is a limit of tolerance for high prices even in Le AI Boom or robomania.
So just keep your own horizon in the picture and dont fall for short term trends. Vice versa dont step into longterm juggernauts if youre looking for really above avg gains in 0-2 years or so. Unrealistic (statistically; esp for beginners) but it happens. (this is obv less harmful than assblowing into high risk garbage btw)

Dont take my word for it ... you could research all this for a lifetime. Its fun and educative. Dont forget to change your views (be adaptable. E.g. ''who moved the cheese") and try on some new clothes occasionally. hope I helped or inspired you in a good way

item.title: Has anyone here ever discovered an edge, developed a working trading strategy, built some sort of useful screener tool o… — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Has anyone here ever discovered an edge, developed a working trading strategy, built some sort of useful screener tool o…

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-06-30 17:55 UTC

OP

Has anyone here ever discovered an edge, developed a working trading strategy, built some sort of useful screener tool or whatever really using AI? There’s gotta be something right

I’m no LLM expert but Claude really does seem insane nowadays, I used it for some data analysis but never really had an idea on how to use it to make some good trades

Early replies (first 3)

62425815
>>62425771
in my experience, its all about your conversation with the model. if you just ask it point blank to build a money generator, it will look up trading 101 sites and use their methodology to create something that won't work. if you discuss your theories that you've built up over years of observation with it, you can actually prime it with what it needs to do well.

62425842
>>62425815
Yes I’ve noticed that too. These models should really have the ability to say „no that’s stupid“. You really have to actively try not to fall into delusions when having conversations with LLMs because then they’ll just slowly feed into them. Claude is way better than ChatGPT when it comes to that but it’s still an echo chamber machine if you’re not careful. I guess the problem is then to have the initial idea yourself out of which a strategy or edge could emerge but I’m not really sure on how to „come up“ with something like that.

62428109
Bump

Does everyone here seriously just hold Dino coins or does anyone actually trade cmon guys

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62428118
>>62425771
AI is only as good as the data you feed it.

62428206
>>62425771
>There’s gotta be something right

Ehh not really. Every trader in the world is using these things, so you're back to the status quo ante regarding alpha.

62428221
>>62425815
No, this is silly and stems from not understanding how competitive current markets are.

62428490
itt: chatbot psychosis - loss edition

62431295
>>62428206
Im sure that’s true for most basic shit but there’s still profitable retail traders out there
>>62428490
Real

62431306
>>62431295
>there’s still profitable retail traders out there
when the market trends upward overall, most traders should be profitable just by pure random chance, not intelligence or strategy.

item.title: Post-AI crypto narrative — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Post-AI crypto narrative

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-06-30 18:06 UTC

OP

>AI takes all jobs
>all wealth moves completely to capital
>labor scrubs are screwed
>labor scrubs scramble to enact communist UBI revolution before capital oligarchs form their own government with killbots
>government has enough control of the currency and economy to redirect gibs to scrubs
>private currency / underground economy is the only way to participate in voluntary/free market capitalism without getting your shit scooped up and redistributed through taxes and inflation
>private currency / underground economy slowly grows enough to destroy scrub economy

Thoughts on this theory? I have held this idea for a while. Feel free to ask questions and I will flesh out my narrative as needed.

This theory implies guns/drones/local llms/manufacturing equipment/btc/monero is the way to go because all of your stocks can just get scooped up. Oh and also looksmaxxing and clout farming because there will be that scrub intermission period where wealth and nepotism doesn't matter so betabuxxing is impossible. inb4 garloids

Early replies (first 3)

62431212
The mum wants to fuck her son now, thats the problem

62431215
>>62431200
You'd like the Sword h h of Truth series.
It has a similar vibe to your post

62431221
>>62431200
Whats wrong with garloids? Mine are doing fine this harvest . . .

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62431254
Most of the underground economy will be the oligarchs who wanted the kill bots in the first place.

>>62428515
The debt slavery/blackmail complex is the oligarchs controlling the government. If a government implemented UBI they just partially freed themselves of it out of fear of becoming disposable debt slaves. Too many people at or near the top are at risk of this happening to them with AI. They are going to find ways to rein in on the debt ponzi scheme.

62431266
>>62431200
>AI allocates scarce resources efficiently
>we all live happily ever after
>the end
it's the only thing that can actually happen

62431271
>man wants to be gigachad that owns a nightclub
>his mother who never helped him wanted him to stay a nerdy loser who gets no pussy
>she would have inevitably harangued him to work at some low tier office job and marry a fat roastie
hahah yeah women are always the victims right

62431302
>>62431266
the most effcient way to allocate resources is 100% to AI and 0% to humans

62431342
>>62431266
>AI tries to allocate resources efficiently
>this isn't profitable to the people who own the AI
>AI gets modified to allocate more resources to the elites

>becomes trillionaire

62429562
USAID spreed AIDS and Ebola in Africa plus financed local warlords, he actually saved hundreds millions of life by end that satanic program.

62429569
>>62429557
>millions of niggers are not physically capable of living without constantly sucking at the us government's teet
It's for the best that it ended

62429570
>>62429562
>>62429569
muskbots detected

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62429571
>>62429570
My only regret is that you weren't one of those millions

62429584
>>62429557
Reddit post #86325677343
GTFO commie.

62429587
>>62429557
Reddit is that way you retarded faggot

62430980
>>62429557
>kills millions
may we see them? Should be easy to document with so many dead and all.

62431000
>>62430980
Certainly there must be mass graves.

62431006
>CIA shills STILL kvetching about USAID
yes, you evil people tend to win. But fighting back will happen.

62431064
>>62429557
Nobody is inherently entitled to foreign aid. They are kept alive by goodwill, which is entirely discretionary.
Wouldn't have existed in the first place without the aid anyways

62431076
>>62429557
No one died; it is pure and simple disinformation.

62431105
>>62429557
>kills millions
Did he kill someone you know of?

62431109
>kills millions by scrapping USAID
>becomes trillionaire

The system worksk

62431113
>>62429557
>billionaire that nobody voted for that has no need for social services gets to cut healthcare and social services
I feel very politically represented.

62431117
>>62429557
Says right here you fucking suck

62431122
>>62431113
Almost all of his cuts and other recommendations are gone now. So we both lose.

62431136
>>62429557
why perpetually feed a population of incompetent, forever dependent retards who will just further explode their population numbers requiring more mouths to us to feed? Let nature handle them the way it always has. They fuck like rabbits and then their babies are eaten by maggots, perfectly balanced just as god intended.

62431194
>>62431136
this. in fact we are also nature and should help kill them faster.

this is a great time to load up on msft

62429981

no, its not, it will be at least 20% lower next year

62430003
>>62429905
This fucking jeet CEO has to go

62430636
I call your mother your sister a group

62431020
>>62429905
It must be those lazy white people's fault. Microsaars needs to hire more of the best & brightest to fix it.

62431039

62431072

62431160

item.title: 201 IQ Business Idea — 10 replies — 5.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
201 IQ Business Idea

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-06-30 16:25 UTC

OP

What If I copy a successful dropshipping store. run ads to it on a hacked fb ad account. then charge peoples card as they buy and simply keep the card and money then delete the store right as people are supposed to get their stuff

Early replies (first 3)

62428716
>>62428703
Saar

62428722
>>62428703
thinking like a BRILLIANT saar

62429088
>>62428716
This is what Russians do

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62429101
>>62428703
not even the jews do these kind of scams, go back to Asia, Chang.

62429256
>>62429101
Profit margin is large

62429299
>>62428703
Problem is it'll only net jeet level money. What site are you going to be able to copy? In the right circumstances you may be able to grab $10k, $20k, but credit cards typically have limited payouts and volume allowed for new customers. They can also drain your accounts if payments are reversed. Even if they can't reverse anything, the merchant will blackmail you after enough chargebacks. At some point maybe you just get a real job

62429338
>>62429299
You are completely talking out of your ass hole. This is extremely common. Ecom people literally call them noshippers or dropkeepers

62429431
>>62428703
I’ve done this a few times, better to use Shopify because apparently you can run any scam you want for years on there and it still won’t get shut down

62429438
>>62429431
Just a few years ago you literally couldn't sell medical masks on shopify. I tried and they shut my site down within hours. But these days I'm seeing lots of fake GPU web front stores post up on Shopify and they don't seem to give a fuck

62430986
>>62429431
wtf that's the worst one

62429973
>>62429965
Kek let the goyim buying the overpriced shit!

itoddlers btfo!

item.title: /smg/ - stock market genera — 336 replies — 904.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
/smg/ - stock market genera

Open thread • Replies: 336 • Updated: 2026-06-30 17:45 UTC

OP

Abenomics edition

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html
https://www.mortgagenewsdaily.com/data/building-permits

>Boomer Investing 101:
https://www.bogleheads.org/wiki/Getting_started
https://www.sec.gov/search-filings

>Misc:
https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

>>62429521

Early replies (first 3)

62430417
I am irrationally exuberant and it feels good

62430419
BUY BUY BUY
(rolls royce)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62431005
how is oil relatively cheap but with hormuz still closed
>pic unrelated

62431007
>>62430961
I’m already in micron x5 with my money

62431010
>>62431005

62431014
>tfw missed the tasty dips in my longs and couldn't average down because I was sleeping

62431016

62431017

62431019
>>62431002

62431021
>>62431014
Based snoozemaxxer

62431022
#PrayForJapan

62431023
Does AI actually hold any future value? Isn’t every company invested in it just burning money? What are they hoping to find in the end?

62431025
>>62431019
unfathomably based and kino cost basis, my average is a whopping $212.92 after selling 2/3rds of it this month

62431026
>>62431016

if you want leverage MSFU is 2x and you have less to worry about if your entry gets rugged on options or there is a happening

62431027
>>62431019
Nice. Too bad you didn't invest more. I routinely kick myself for missing $8 soxl.

62431028
>>62430999
I want to go back to work

62431033
>>62431016
Never more than a 12 months, just wasted capital. Never shorter than 2 weeks

62431034
>>62431004
both

62431036
>>62431016
Stop gambling.

62431043
How the fuck do you guys even hold SOXL longer than a week with all its pullbacks

62431047

62431050
today i bought a dutch company
wtf?

62431051
>hold rklb
>win

Is it that easy?

62431052
Chevron corp has been found dead in its home this morning. Police say the cause of death was a self inflicted gunshot wound to the dick and balls.

62431053
>>62431025
>>62431027
I initially had 100 and then sold 50(at $122) when it first hit $130 as it started drilling a bit and I saw you know who posting which always meant the top is in for it

62431055
What the fuck is this gay nigger market doing?
Go down
FUCK

62431056
>>62431036
literally how
everything is a gamble at this point

62431059
>>62431033
>>62431026
good advice

>>62431036
what makes this a gamble? on paper this genuinely looks like a good trade to me.

62431061

62431065

>>62431060

62431070

item.title: VOO and Chill — 161 replies — 157.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 161 • Updated: 2026-06-30 17:06 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62423236
>>62423192
Is this a backtest or actual holdings in real time, I dont recognize the site UI

62423245
>>62423192
for reference, this is what Im rockin...

62423267
40/40/20 VDY/XEI/XEQT is extremely comfy for any Canadians reading this thread

62423719
>>62422917
retard he is telling you to risk adjust your allocations as you get older, when you're 60 it's more about capital preservation than getting high returns

62423769
this thread is getting dumber by the day

62423809
Using a reversion to the mean strategy on indexes, I managed to get a 17% CAGR over 54 years only trading indexes/ETFs (where data permits) on backtesting, significantly beating each individual index . More enquiry is warranted but I think "VOO and chill" can be improved upon and optimized.

62423821
>>62423719
he mentioned rn

62423875
>>62400636
It actually is something tho. $150 a month becomes 170k at 7% real returns for 30 years. This gives you an extra $570/mo in retirement.

Is that a LOT? Fuck no. But we’re talking poorfag standards where social security is the only thing you have. An extra 500-600 a month is a significant increase over base SS for a poorfag especially if you move to an ultra low cost of living area.

62423880
The reason i keep bringing up DRAM and other return stuff is because it's on my mind to go into that stuff now, sell, and then increase my VOO position even further - not to infinitely chase returns btw

62424100
>>62423880
I'm putting 20k into micron tomorrow. I feel like it's not to late for this to just keep going up. Its not going to 10x but 4-5, yeah...

62424179
>>62424100
why only micron, why not dram etf

62424607
>>62400636
>The problem is we have people starting at age 35 with like 150 a month thinking it's going to somehow mean something.
I'm in this and doing VT. Maybe I'll be ok probably not. Can do more than $150 though

62424664
I seriously cannot decide between just not thinking and doing broad ETFs and trying to chase this AI thing

62426022
>>62423236
>>62423245
It's a mostly unserious backtest, site was posted earlier >>62419980

>>62423769
Why not have some fun and make the most unhinged etf port possible??

62426103
>>62426022
Interesting thanks

62426138
I have been degenerately long-only various semiconductors since the april bottom and yet on 90% of days, I've underperformed soxl on the way up and outperformed it on the way down. After doing all my research and picking the right names and calculating the right options to buy, I should have thrown all my notes in the trash and just bought soxl. Even if this is the bubble top and soxl is about to go down 90%, I know from experience my stock picks will go down 95%. So I stay may as well buy soxl.

62426144
If I'm just starting out with this stuff, what's wrong with 70% VTI / 30% VXUS?

62426154
Honestly I’m seeing a lot of upside to going into QQQ over VOO as long as you are okay with the fact it is more volatile
The upside it’s just so huge when compounded

62426173
>>62426154
Or honestly, as someone already in VOO, I wonder if it makes sense to just go into something like VGT which has consistently beaten VOO and QQQ (for now anyway) or something like DRAM
A lot of VGTs holdings are currently down but it’s YTD is higher

62426183
>>62407078
I keep half of my funds in VTWAX, rebalancing annually. Right now I'm down 0.84% this year, my portfolio is fucked but VTWAX is my safety net.

62427417
I am also curious about DRAM can anyone tell me if it’s a good hold for a short while

62428031
jfc DRAM (ie a thematic ETF) is bullshit made for retard retail investors that get their financial advice from grifters off of tiktok. this happens every time a finance topic hits the news and every time people get burned.
barely worth saying. if you're unironically taking advice from /biz/ you're already doomed intellectually.

62428054
>>62428031
but why exactly, what reason is there to believe the companies within it won't continue to turn a profit for the foreseeable future?

62428080
>>62428031
>>62428054
Like I'm serious, what exactly is wrong about holding it and selling once memory cools down, is it smarter to just go into a more volatile ETF that at least has a longer history if you want more returns, is it just hype and not really the next big thing, explain why

62428238
>>62428080
this is basic finance 101, there are plenty of resources online or off that will explain it to you.
ignorance isn't even the issue here, your reaction to not knowing something is to have random retards on a thinly veiled gambling board tell you what to think. and don't just jump on another grifter selling a course or ask some AI slop engine and ask it leading questions like "why is investing in DRAM a good idea?".

62428337
>>62428238
In other words you don't know

62429683
>>62400493
Anon there is nothing wrong with doing VOO and chill if you have time and principal
Going into wildly volatile ETFs can be okay if it’s a satellite account
Just be careful of FOMO and not being risk averse
You sound like you have a good head on your shoulders though
Remember this is money, real money, your money

62430693
VOO anons where you at?

62430902
>>62400493
Contrarian nerds always lose.
Always.
In middle school dating.
Being high school incels.
In college.
At work.
In love.
At investing.
At all times.
Follow the crowd and try to fit in. Everyone doing anything else is a reject loser.

62431131
>>62430902
Who is being the contrarian here though

item.title: >only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable >now we know the price floor is $150 now is the time to buy SPCX — 52 replies — 33.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
>only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable >now we know the price floor is $150 now is the time to buy SPCX

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-06-30 16:34 UTC

OP

>only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable
>now we know the price floor is $150
now is the time to buy SPCX

Early replies (first 3)

62408493
>>62408480
Bagholder cope.

62408507
>>62408493
No cope saar only gains to be made! Please buy more stocks from this very profitable company! Time is limited for maximum gains must hurry before money train takes off!

62408519
>>62408480
>>only down 4% from its ipo,
kek about to 50% in 6 months

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62416005
>>62408480
90x earnings is INSANE. Investing in this is a sure marker you are retarded and willful exit liquidity. Equivalent to buying Worldcomm with the exception that Space X probably has a longterm future, but is at absolute bubble top with an ABSURD valuation and no course to revenues in the near future, kept aloft by virtue of its multiple rules changed inclusion in indices receiving passive flows and retail hype that has come and gone.

62416247
>>62416005
>>62415763
it's already up for the day!

62416343
>>62416005
>Investing in this is a sure marker you are retarded and willful exit liquidity

while true, never underestimate the retardation of the retail masses

62416471
>>62408480
Keep buy Bagholders, keep buying!

62416737
>>62408480
I haven't seen a single bull "case" that has used numbers for buying Spcx. Meanwhile all Bears have to do is look at that those Quarterly and Y/Y financials directly below OP's image they were conveniently edited out.

62416873
>>62415707
Yep people of /biz/ seem to be unable to value this asset correctly. The SpaceMarines are back!!

62417077
doubters in shambles

62417086
AI FUCKING DATA CENTERS IN SPACE!

62417121
>>62408480
IT JUST KEEPS TUMBLIMG DOWN TUMBLIMG DOWN
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oIscL-Bjsq4

BAGGIES ARE YOU OK
BAGGIES ARE YOU OK
ARE YOU OK BAGGIES


Did you guys manage to sell in thegreen be honest?

62417135
>>62408480
ITS OVER

62417520
>>62417077
Yep, truly in shambles. Another down day.

Even if SpaceX is an amazing compnay, entry point matters. SpaceX market cap at $1 trillion is when it starts to get somewhat attractive. Just be patient young Padawon.

62418371
>>62408480
>only down 4% from its ipo, which is very reasonable
okay so you expected 30% by now... or what..... what is this point? this isnt even cope it's just weird

62419735
>>62408480
The price floor was always $150.
If it's below that at (can't remember date) they can't sell more stock.
So it's got to be $150 by that date. Someone can find it. Don't care.

62419742
isn't most of retail locked in until precisely the point where early investors are legally allowed to sell and cash in at any price? oh yes they are.

62419746
>>62414178
the listing has a TAM of equivalent of the total value of the us economy, or the the money spent on food by the planet, every year, year on year, to pay for its ai services. are elons data centres worth more than the entire us economy, or the entire global food chain supply, now or in the future?

62419817
>>62419746
Qualifier.
Do I live in a machine in the future?

62419957
OP bought the top and is now panicking to sell the bottom

62420705
>>62419957
This is the vibe I'm getting. I really hope you guys didn't see the most obvious pump and dump scheme in history and still fall for it like an indian who can see the train coming yet still gets hit by it.

62421234
Imagine when starship fails, imagine when you can dump without IPO penalty.

62421347
>>62419957
not even remotely close to the bottom

62422910
>>62417520
More like $200bn MC,

62425386
>>62408480
You are supposed to buy in 6-12 months in depending on how much it ultimately drops

62427489
doubters?

62427900
this thread got REAL quiet. FOMO?

62427959
>>62411812
I am thinking this too. Obviously not real value, but the bigger fool strategy will work here.
Is there any crypto pegged to the value of SpaceX already? I don't want to do KYC

62430830
we are so back

62430972
>>62408480
IPO is mindboggingly overvalued.
They have no income.
They're pushing into a wholly unrelated business with tens of billions of your bucks.
And lockup release of investor shares is approaching.

Enjoy your bags.

62430994
>>62430972
>(USD) Mar 2026 Y/Y
>Revenue 4.69B +15.42%
>Net income -4.28B −709.85%
>Diluted EPS -1.27 −605.56%
>Net profit margin -91.09% −601.77%
>Buying

62430997
>>62430994
>Now let me just doctor the P/L statement right here...

62431011
>>62408480
Lol the major shareholders haven't even started selling. This is just the price being paid for the 4% of shares that went public for the IPO.

item.title: There is one and ONLY one actual currency in the world: deep creampies inside of attractive women. — 46 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
There is one and ONLY one actual currency in the world: deep creampies inside of attractive women.

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-06-30 15:50 UTC

OP

There is one and ONLY one actual currency in the world: deep creampies inside of attractive women. This is what everyone wants, what literally the entire economy was built to acquire. Every skyscraper you see was designed and erected for the sole purpose of achieving the aforementioned creampie experience. Every other currency is a proxy for the real one. Gold, USD, Bitcoin, none of it has "real" value. Only the bath of pleasure that comes from nutting in a pretty woman does. Orient your investment philosophy around this fact sooner rather than later.

Early replies (first 3)

62425808
>>62425803
Ok saaar, just sold my pregnantbutt for pretty girl puss!

62425825
>>62425803
Dude creampie feel the best when you are the 18yo not post wall.

62425847
>>62425803
you are an r-selected retard who cannot think 30 seconds ahead

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62426283
>>62425803
Anon, we're not rabbits. Creampies don't matter, raising the kids does. The true currency is having a grandchild, because you know your kid isn't a degenerate failure if that happens

62426290
>>62426271
You were correct then. But society needed you to wage, and that meant torturing you into accepting fake goals instead of creampie-ish ones.

62426295
>>62426283
Pure copium. In your heart of hearts you know this, anon.

62426305
i have dik and I must coom

62426328
>>62426305
You'd better while you are young, or you will sorely regret it.

62426382
https://youtu.be/nql07h-cPF0

62426414
We appreciate posts like this

62426770
>>62426414
Good because there's a lot more of them coming.

62426869
>>62425803
She isn't attractive

62426885
Actually no, this is the mind of a coombrained goyslave and why you will never accomplish anything.

62428162
>>62426885
>accomplish

Ahh there's that cope again. Anything to distract you from your deepest biological urges.

62428259
don't listen, link marines. just buy more link, don't think about this, you are not allowed

62428264
>>62425803
I literally just want to be rich so I can live my childhood summers forever. I don't give a fuck about women anymore. I figured out the key to my happiness and its the in the first two sentences.

62428338
>>62425803
Epstein Islanders would have to disagree on the best currency but you are close just a few years off

62428404
>>62428264
giga cope

62428410
>>62426198
why are they couvering their noise in this manner

62428448
>>62428404
kek no, not even a little bit. Maybe when you hit your 30s and actually have experience with women you'll feel the same. I can see how missing out on "teenage love" would fuck you over with regret forever though. So, maybe you'll never know peace but I've been fucking since I was 14 so I'm doing well. 99% of men who say what I say are probably coping though.

62429586
>tfw have only nutted in 1 girl's pussy in years
Having a wife is... okay.

62429590
>>62429586
I'm 32 virgin

62429603
>>62429590
BAHAHAHAHAHAHAH

62429699
>>62425803
came to a revelation. gay niggas disprove this theory

62429730
>>62425803
Based, the final redpill
>>62426198
A massive boon

62429743
>>62426187
This hits hard.

62429810
>>62429586
It's infinitely better than one night stands

62429930
>>62425803
TRVKE

62430097
>>62425803
cant creampie without commodities though what society lets you creampie without being a tool or part of the machine tell me

62430656
>>62426263
The best example of that is this: https://www.reddit.com/r/DecidingToBeBetter/comments/1uig6mr/happy_marriage_constant_fomo_and_thoughts_about/
You absolute fucktard. Just sexually cheat on your wife with prime puss. It means nothing, it's not your marriage. If no one but you finds out literally no harm is being done.

62430708
>>62430656
prime puss dont play that game. wake up kumar

62430732
>>62429810
If we're solely talking about sex, depends on the ONS
Sex with someone you love is generally better than casual sex, but I've had some pretty above average one night stands

62430847
>>62430656
Fuck you, that redditor too has the wrong idea. Either divorce her if the love is gone or quit being retarded. You can literally go to all these places with your wife and make love to her there.
t. khhv

item.title: Theyre ending the Chainlink BUILD program — 114 replies — 16.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Theyre ending the Chainlink BUILD program

Open thread • Replies: 114 • Updated: 2026-06-30 11:20 UTC

OP

LMAO!!!!!

https://chain.link/blog/build-program-evolution

Early replies (first 3)

62417511
xrp is the chosen coin…it’s undeniable at this point

62417512
Come on man, this shit still spamming after 8 years? Just give it up. There are thousands of other coins.

62417514
"Chainlink Labs is transitioning from payments made in project tokens to focusing on commercial agreements involving fees paid in LINK or other liquid assets that can be readily converted to LINK."

Build members will buy my bags?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62423276
>>62422761
Always been the case. Before it comes morons push whatever release as "they key" that will unlock all token value and you need to have your ducks in a row beforehand. Then it passes and they go fucking radio silent. Then half a year later that thing was never a big deal anyway and we should all not talk about it.

You had spastics making charts about how BUILD alone would return $1-2 per link staked each month. If you mentioned what a universal collection of utter vaporware shit the projects were you would get called a fudder.

62423282
>>62417535
Sir Gay indeed.

62423283
>>62423276
You're talking to yourself.
Nobody keeps tabs on every single granular development from a project they hate for years, but here you are juggling IDs pretending there are dozens of you.

62423312
>>62423276
My wife asked me where we're going to go on vacation this year with the money we made from the folk finance drop. I don't have the heart to tell her that we might be able to split a kids meal at Applebee's. She looks up to me as an intelligent head of the house.

62423353
60k link staked.. 20k USD a year... i needed the build rewards to fuck around with...

62423360
>>62423276
/thread
the constant gaslighting is even more annoying desu
>samefags reeeeeee

62423389
>>62423360
Why are you even reading this "gaslighting"? Who's forcing you to be here?

62423462
>>62423259
Hilarious deflection after doing this
>>62422274

The absolute state

62423474
>>62423353
How does 2 million a year sound?

62424023
>>62423283
I kept granular details on a project i own for years, to my incomprehensible regret

62424140
>>62423276
The sad fact of the matter is that jeetlinkers will still be delirious off copium a decade from now, even after CLL pulls the plug in five years beforehand.

62424195
good. i never could participate in build anyway as a US fag

62424386
>>62422668
It literally says "the most recent season of Chainlink Rewards will mark the conclusion of Build-related token rewards, with claims ending on July 7, 2026" meaning no season 2+ of build rewards going to stakers.

It also says "Proceeds from these new agreements are expected to be programmatically converted to LINK and used to support the growth of the network through programs such as the Chainlink Reserve." meaning that link goes to the reserve, not to stakers.

Previously
>stakers will get build rewards

Now
>Chainlink gets paid in link

62424528
xswap isnt even on cow swap? where do you sell this trash?

62424728
S E X

62424821
>>62424386
Brutal

62425620
>>62424023
>this project has always been pushed by morons
>also I've been holding this project for years

You're lying. And brown.

>>62424386
You're a brown ESL monkey who doesn't even know what the words "such as" mean.
Protip: the same exact words were used when Build was first introduced.

62425675
>>62417503
HAHAHAHAHAHAHA Another nail in the coffin and shovel full of dirt in the grave on the biggest retail fraud in token history.

62425681
>>62419638
Link is underperforming fucking death spiraled LUNC since Trump revived crypto. Lol And by a lot.

62425687
>>62419707
>A chainlink shill calling someone else brown.

62425699
>>62422159
>>62423276
Perfectly said.

62425962
>>62425620
I'm a 100k link holder. I have more link than you.

"Such as" isn't very fucking reliable. All of this would be fine if link was valued as it should be but it fucking isn't, with no clear path to gaining that value.

62425980
>>62425962
>CLL uses "such as" in 2022 when launching Build
>THIS IS SET IN STONE

>CLL uses "such as" in 2026 when changing Build
>THIS IS NOT VERY FUCKING RELIABLE

You're a brown paid fuddie.

62426004
>>62425980
I'm also whiter than you, Yank.

62426010
>>62425980
>>62425620
post a picture of your hand with timestamp

62426949
i am just getting caught up on this news after the weekend. my my my how the mighty have fallen

i predicted all of this for the last few years but the boyscouts couldn't handle it

>duuuuuuuuuuuude i need a team of tax attorneys for the heckin rewards

BAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAH

look at you now. an expensive lesson on controlling your ego. you needed it tho


your hubris was your downfall

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62426967
>>62417512
>There are thousands of other coins.

LOL this dude stuck in 2021. that's your conclusion bro, just buy other scam coins?

don't you people get it? altcoins are dead. capital moved back to actual companies in the stock market. only a retarded sap would continue donating to a bunch of nerds for a "whitepaper"


>>62417833
>I'll also (again just playing the other side) point out the regardless of whether or not it ultimately benefits the LINK token, Chainlink is realistically one of like 5 crypto projects amongst the hundreds of "legitimate" ones that actually is seeing real adoption and has a huge use case that is surviving the infantile stages of crypto, and not just surviving but will thrive. So again, who knows if this ultimately helps the token price, but I do understand why linkies hold onto some faith still.

so are you just a fan of the company?

>>62417873
>It’s all push and pull. Ying yang. If you have 20 million earning you 800k (500k post tax) per year

who the fuck would do that? the $20m has drawn down 80% so no, life is not good. anyone not retarded would've parked most of that in the s&p500 and has been making at least 15% per year

if you really wanted pathetic 4% return you could get that in a savings account where your only risk is that actual bank going bust

62427007
>>62418846
> The opportunity to invest in something like Chainlink - core infrastructure with insane value capture potential, has never really existed before. The closest thing maybe would be investing in AMZN prior to cloud services,

you are not invested in chainlink. you made a donation kid

amazon's revenue in year 7 was $3B. and that's in 2001 numbers. you can go ahead and stop comparing to your shitcoin bro you're embarrassing yourself

>>62420893
>The fuck is that analogy lmao. This isn't a casino you dumb faggot, real people invested real money into an asset that promised certain things by certain dates and they have not only underdelivered but are starting to actively ignore those promises.

it's the end stage of a cult investment where they turn on each other. it somehow becomes the fault of the "community" on why they didnt make any money.

in order to preserve their ego, guys like >>62420825 have to spin the story that you'd have to be crazy to expect any kind of gains. mind you the rest of the world's market all hit all time highs while you are down 80-90%. by creating this narrative, he avoids recognizing he's holding a really bad investment and can continue on thinking he's a secret genius.

62427022
remember this old pasta? still relevant today. every cl product roughly follows this life cycle

62429766
>>62425681
Oh I remember this one - this poster is an actual bot.

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 183 replies — 12.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 183 • Updated: 2026-06-30 04:00 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62410051
Under 10k you just need to have a job and save cash.
You need cash flow and if you dont have shit a job is the only way to start.

62410731
Bump

62411520
>>62408558
>2017
still in high school
>2021
still in uni
>December of 2024
just graduated and was looking for jobs (i still had 0 dollars to my name at that point)

62411614
>>62373752
>>62373772
>>62373798
>>62373799
>>62373803
>post Maccari's "Cicero Denounces Catiline" (1888)
>crop out Catiline
Fuck you OP, I'm glad you're poor.

62412314
>>62411520
You could've played the memecoin casino in 2021.

62413842
Bump, I'll be free tomorrow

62416357
Bump

62417812
page 9 bump. Don't say I never did anything for you.

62418065
Almost the weekend then I can devote my energies to this thread.

And a big thank you to the poster above this post, looks like you were based after all

62418133
Bump

62418220
I got out and made tens of dollars this week with MU and SNDK. Lost some with WDC.

62419326
This is very stupid but an anon in some other thread weeks ago shilled me TNYA. He gave no explanation, no catalyst, no description what the company even does but he said that we’ll be eating good in like 1-2 years I don’t even remember exactly when. But hey it’s a cheap stock and he sounded confident to me

62419390
go all in hbar when it bottoms at 0.03

62419964
Bump, just woke up, let's get started

It would appear that everyone is talking about the new WENDYs Stock

62425537
op was not a fag this thread has good vibes we should keep it going until we all make it
personally im trading perps with a system after 10 years of learning charts off/on but finally committing
did a 32x in 2021 and should have been able to retire but didnt anticipate the biden years so here we are going pure psycho mode like we did back then but even harder until money is /solved/, then I'll keep trading for the love of the game cuz it's the best sport in the world

62425849
>>62423064

62425890
>>62425537
Got any good tips/ressources on learning to trade charts? trying to get into it too

62427228
>>62425849
I concede. I'll look for a more productive venture but I won't let the thread or general die, it will be some time before value is struck, I will admit that. I can be tenacious if nothing else.

62428130
>>62425890
emperorBTC's telegram has a basic bitch tldr set of material to learn from. also has a youtube where he goes over stuff. that's where I started and I like that he focuses on the absolute basics, although he leans heavily towards confirmation w/ volume which others may disagree with. btc focused but btc/crypto is perhaps the most effective use of TA.
basically there's no need to get fancy and the chart is the final source of truth because what the price does > what people cope and/or seethe about
support/resistance levels and price action with risk management (defined r:r) = compound as you get gud
once you commit you'll realize "the catch" on people actually make money from trading is is simply how retarded the overwhelming majority of people are that they simply cannot manage a few simple tenets to click buttons and make money, you likely being one of them if you don't develop a process and risk too much on trades
gl anon

62428141
>>62428130
also perps have exploded so trading equities for crypto natives has been a pleasure to avoid tradfi gatekeeping bs
follow the right people on twatter with alerts set to on and it's like having multiple research firms giving alpha for free-- key word "right" accounts. hopefully you have the pattern recognition to figure out which are spewing paid channel larps and which are providing genuine insight
that's basically the whole game. if you can get into a group chat with other chads that's even better because a network is stronger than you alone, although this is def an arena where it ultimately comes down to you mastering yourself (you can't copy trade your way to wealth but you can learn what others do/how they enter/exit positions)
legend trade is a new perps platform that's gamifying this if you wanna start there instead of hyperliquid (front-end using hyperliquid)
Also bigtrout300 on twitter and join his tg as well he's pretty dope. There's a lot of great accounts posting good shit right now. Some really good posters fade in/out of cycles while the scammers/extractors are always abundant, but just use discretion

62428170
>pic related
>"...focus on the chart as these information is very likely to be priced in already"
the "TA is astrology for men" line is used to make fun of retards who take it too far and treat it like divination when in reality it's all stacking probabilities/confluence in your favor as best you can, and from the above example you can see relying on your feed for information will almost always be slower than the chart

other X goats that have been killing it IMO recently:

never been a better time to go full NEET
